query:
-- Check internet addresses from CSV against DB
SELECT id, connectionId, locationAddress, serviceType, status
FROM services
WHERE locationAddress LIKE '%Maryborough%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Cleveland%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Kippa-Ring%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Brendale%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Coolum%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Sippy Downs%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Milton%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Torquay%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Tewantin%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Rockhampton%'
LIMIT 30;
